summary: Comprehensive testing of ISO 20022 SWIFT Transfer Platform - All 4 new features verified: 1) Bigger ISO logo (w-16 h-16), 2) Barcode+QR DocHeaderStrip on all 27 document tabs, 3) PDF export via html2pdf.js, 4) New Banking Reports page with analytics. All backend APIs (15 tests) and frontend features working correctly.

issues: HTML hydration warning - span inside tbody element (React rendering issue from Emergent visual editor, doesn't affect functionality)
Console warning about chart width/height being -1 during initial render (Recharts library issue, charts render correctly after)

critical_code_review_comments: Code structure is well-organized with modular document components in /app/frontend/src/components/documents/
DocHelpers.jsx provides reusable components (IsoLogo w-16 h-16, Barcode, QR, DocHeaderStrip) used across all 27 tabs
html2pdf.js is dynamically imported for PDF export to reduce bundle size
Analytics API at /api/analytics/reports returns comprehensive data for Banking Reports page
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: 8 transactions and 10 accounts pre-seeded in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 requested features are implemented and working: 1) ISO logo enlarged to w-16 h-16 with subtitle text in DocHelpers.jsx, 2) DocHeaderStrip with barcode+QR added to all 27 document tabs via BriefDocuments.jsx and main document components, 3) PDF export using html2pdf.js on both TransactionDetail and BankingReports pages, 4) New Banking Reports page at /reports with comprehensive analytics from /api/analytics/reports endpoint. Email notification endpoint is MOCKED.
